segments.text: Watch out, watch out—this could be huge for Kazuya! He's going for the down throw!
segments.original_text: Ojo, cuidado, porque aquí esto puede ser buena situación para el Cazuya, que va a salir con el downer.

segments.text: I think Spargo could've gone for something there, but didn't.
segments.original_text: Creo que Taki Spargo podía haber intentado encontrar algo, pero no.

segments.text: Going for the down throw again!
segments.original_text: Decide salir otra vez con el Fele a buscar el downer.
Y el López más, que va a...

full_text: He's cracked! He's so cracked! He's so cracked! He's making anything work! He's doing something wild! Yeah. What's Ani doing? Watch out, watch out—this could be huge for Kazuya! He's going for the down throw! I think Spargo could've gone for something there, but didn't. Going for the down throw again! And then López...
